sourceSummary.oneLine: EU Declaration of Conformity for H&abyz Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector models A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW under Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Declares that the listed devices conform to Regulation (EU) 2017/745 and identifies manufacturer, authorised representative, notified body, classification, conformity assessment route, standards, and guidelines.
keyPoints: The declaration states it is issued under the sole responsibility of the manufacturer.
The device is identified as a Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector with model names A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
Risk class is stated as Class IIa in accordance with rule 17 of Annex VIII of Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
The conformity assessment procedure is Annex IX based on a quality management system and assessment of technical documentation.
Notified Body is 3EC International a.s. with Notified Body Number 2265.
The date field is present only as the placeholder "날짜".

evidence.claim: The document is an EU Declaration of Conformity.
evidence.evidenceText: EU Declaration of Conformity

evidence.claim: The declaration is made in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
evidence.evidenceText: In accordance with Regulation (EU) 2017/745 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 5 April 2017

evidence.claim: The declaration states the products meet the provisions of Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
evidence.evidenceText: We herewith declare that the under-mentioned products meet the provisions of the Regulation (EU) 2017/745 of the European Parliament and of the Council of 5 April 2017.

evidence.claim: The EU Declaration of Conformity is issued under the sole responsibility of the manufacturer.
evidence.evidenceText: This EU Declaration of Conformity is issued under the sole responsibility of the manufacturer.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is H&abyz Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: Manufacturer H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer's SRN is KR-MF-000020684.
The authorised representative is JaviTech e.K in Germany.
evidence.evidenceText: Authorised Representative JaviTech e.K Sachsenhausener Straße 16, 65824 Schwalbach am Taunus, Germany

evidence.claim: The product name is Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

evidence.claim: The model names are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: Model Name A1717MCW / A1417MCW / F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The devices are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors designed for digital radiography systems.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW are wired or wireless digital flat panel detectors that have been designed for faster, more streamlined approach to digital radiography systems.

evidence.claim: The detectors include TFT, CsI scintillator, and electronics converting read data into digital signals.
evidence.evidenceText: The detector consists of TFT and Scintillator (CsI) and an electronic device that converts data read through it into digital signals.

evidence.claim: The detectors support auto exposure detection technology for use without generator integration.
evidence.evidenceText: The detectors support an auto exposure detection technology that allows the detectors to be used without generator integration.

evidence.claim: The intended purpose is a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy for adults and children.
evidence.evidenceText: The A1717MCW/A1417MCW/F1417MCW is indicated for digital imaging solution designed for providing general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy targeting both adult and children.

evidence.claim: The devices are intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and support real-time diagnosis and treatment planning.
evidence.evidenceText: It is intended to replace film based radiographic diagnostic systems and provide more precise case diagnosis and treatment planning on a real time basis for physicians and radiologists.

evidence.claim: The EMDN code is Z11031180.
evidence.evidenceText: EMDN Code Z11031180

evidence.claim: The draft term description is systems for direct digital radiology hardware accessories.
evidence.evidenceText: SYSTEMS FOR DIRECT DIGITAL RADIOLOGY (DR) - HARDWARE ACCESSORIES

evidence.claim: The Basic UDI-DI is 88000704HAAP-27U.
evidence.evidenceText: Basic UDI-DI of the device 88000704HAAP-27U

evidence.claim: The device risk class is Class IIa.
evidence.evidenceText: Risk Class of the device Class IIa
evidence.pageTarget: EU MDR Class IIa Medical Device

evidence.evidenceText: In accordance with the rule 17 of Classification Rules set out in Annex VIII of Regulation (EU) 2017/745

evidence.evidenceText: Annex IX Conformity assessment based on a quality management system and assessment of the technical documentation

evidence.evidenceText: Notified Body 3EC International a.s.

evidence.evidenceText: Notified Body Number: 2265

evidence.evidenceText: Yunhee Kim, President of H&abyz Co., Ltd. On behalf of H&abyz Co., Ltd.

evidence.evidenceText: Guidelines 1 MDCG 2020-8 Guidance on PMCF evaluation report template April 2020 2 MDCG 2020-7 Guidance on PMCF plan template April 2020 3 MDCG 2021-24 Guidance on classification of medical devices October 2021 4 MDCG 2020-5 Clinical Evaluation - Equivalence: A guide for manufacturers and notified bodies April 2020 5 MDCG 2019-16 Guidance on cybersecurity for medical devices December 2019

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not available; the source text shows only the placeholder "Date: 날짜".
Authority signal metadata says "MFDS/domestic", but the document text is an EU MDR Declaration of Conformity under Regulation (EU) 2017/745.
Revision "rev.1" is taken from the sourcePath filename rather than the body text.
Potential conflicting or low-quality standard text: EN ISO 10993-10 is listed as 2010 while the title references ISO 10993-10:2021.
Potential transcription issue in standard entry "EN 60950-1:2006+A11:2009 +1:2010+A12:2011+A2:2013".
